summary: Iteration 9 (Karigar Ledger + Productivity Bonus + Print PDF + image banner): all 4 enhancements verified end-to-end. Backend 6/6 endpoints passed; frontend 5/5 UI checks passed. Productivity-bonus formula and payroll net_payable formula validated with controlled data.
passed: PATCH /api/workers/{id} with bonus_pct=10 + target_cycle_days=30 persists; GET returns 10/30
POST /api/advances with txn_type='payment' -> 200, txn_type='bonus' -> 200 (also 'advance', 'adjustment' supported via Literal)

GET /api/workers/{wid}/ledger returns {worker, entries[], total_earned, total_paid, balance}; running balance correct (earnings +, payments/advances -). For Ajay: 1800 earn +180 prod-bonus +100 manual-bonus -500 adv -100 adv -300 pay -300 pay = 880 balance
GET /api/reports/payroll returns rows with total_bonus, advances_open, payments_paid. Formula verified: 1800 + 280 - 600 - 600 = 880 net_payable
Productivity bonus auto-applied: worker.bonus_pct=10, target=30d -> ledger entry 'Productivity bonus (10.0%)' amount=180 (=1800*0.10)
Workers page: Add Karigar drawer shows 'Productivity Bonus %' and 'Target Cycle (days)' inputs (screenshot confirms)
Payroll page: 5 KPI tiles visible (Karigars / Earnings / Bonus / Paid Out + Advances / Net Balance) and table has Bonus + Paid/Advance + Net Balance columns

Ledger drawer opens with 3 KPIs (Total Earned ₹9,600 / Total Paid Out ₹500 / Net Balance Due ₹9,100), 'Record Payment' button at top, Credit/Debit/Balance columns showing 4 earnings + 1 payment with running balance
Production page: 10 Print buttons found (one per production card)
notes: Image banner code is in place but seeded Siyaram styles have no image_url so banner doesn't render visually (expected per problem statement). Login redirect lands on '/' not '/dashboard'; test script worked around this and verified all authed routes load correctly.
